eol_components.rationale: RHEL 7, Python 3.9, Tomcat 6.1, PostgreSQL 13 all EOL

key_risk_factors: All four technology components are EOL
Python 3.9 EOL means no security patches for the application runtime
PostgreSQL 13 EOL — database upgrade path needed
modernization_notes: Despite having the most EOL components, AnalyticsApp-003 is the most straightforward to modernize. Already containerized, low criticality, single environment, and open-source stack. Upgrade paths are well-documented.
